# ECCG Research Agent

> A continuously-updated research aggregator for the Event Camera Community
> Group (ECCG). Tracks 1,300+ event-based-vision and neuromorphic-compute
> papers from arXiv + Semantic Scholar, scored by a transparent 9-axis
> rubric and ranked by replication-strength citations + community votes.

## Audience

Researchers and engineers working on event cameras (DVS, DAVIS, Prophesee,
spike cameras), event-based vision (SLAM, optical flow, depth, object
detection, segmentation), and neuromorphic computing (SNNs, Loihi,
TrueNorth, SpiNNaker, memristors).

## Primary entry points

- Top-ranked papers: https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/
- Community leaderboard: https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/leaderboard
- Most-influential papers (replication-weighted): https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/influential
- Recent additions: https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/whats-new
- Coverage gaps (papers cited by the corpus but not indexed): https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/gaps
- Per-niche home pages: https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/n/event_camera, /n/neuromorphic_compute, /n/spike_camera
- Browse by taxonomy: https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/categories
- Browse by institution: https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/institutions
- Browse by author: https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/author/{name}
- Browse by paper: https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/paper/{arxiv-id}
- Recurring community meetings (with transcripts + paper mentions): https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/meetings
- Search: https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/search?q=

## Machine-readable surfaces

- Sitemap (full URL list): https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- RSS feed (top papers): https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/feed.xml
- Library export (JSON): https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/api/library/export?format=json
- Library export (CSV): https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/api/library/export?format=csv
- Library export (BibTeX): https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/api/library/export?format=bibtex
- Annotated BibTeX (with team notes): https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/api/library/export?format=bibtex&include_notes=1
- Health status: https://eccg-research-agent.vercel.app/api/health

## How papers are scored

Each paper gets a transparent 0-100 score weighted across nine axes:
ECCG relevance, citation velocity, in-corpus citation graph,
community votes, code availability, novelty (semantic-embedding-based),
venue prestige, author signal (h-index), recency. The rubric weights are
team-configurable at /settings.

The leaderboard's "influence" mode additionally weights citations by their
S2 intent (methodology / result / extension count more than background)
and doubles the weight of votes from editors on the EDITORS_EMAILS
allowlist.

## Citation conventions

If quoting a paper from this site, please cite the paper itself (use the
BibTeX entry or the arXiv id shown on each /paper/{id} page), not this
aggregator. This site is a discovery + ranking tool, not a source of
record.

## License + attribution

Site code: MIT (see GitHub link in the footer).
Paper metadata: pulled from arXiv (CC-0 / arxiv non-exclusive license)
and Semantic Scholar (S2 API terms — non-commercial research use).
Team notes / votes / library: shared Drive state, not licensed for
external use.

Source: https://github.com/IsaiahDupree/eccg-research-agent
Maintainer: Isaiah Dupree, isaiahdupree33@gmail.com
